title: M&G SLIDING RETRACTABLE ERASER PEN
subtitle: M&G SLIDING RETRACTABLE ERASER
overview: Introduction: The M&G Sliding Eraser blends practicality with style, featuring a durable design and a convenient push-pull self-locking mechanism. Effortlessly slide the eraser in and out while keeping it securely locked when not in use. Available in vibrant green, purple, and pink, it ensures a smooth and damage-free erasing experience on paper. Crafted from high-quality TPE material, the eraser offers long-lasting durability, resisting breakage even with frequent use. Ideal for students and professionals, this eraser combines functionality with colorful design to meet everyday erasing needs. Product Highlights: Push-Pull Self-Locking Mechanism: Effortlessly slide the eraser in and out with a secure locking feature. Sliding Function: Convenient mechanism for quick access and secure storage. Vibrant Color Options: Available in green, purple, and pink to match different preferences. Gentle on Paper: Soft TPE material ensures smooth erasing without tearing or damaging paper. Effective Cl
key_features: Push-Pull Self-Locking Mechanism:Effortlessly slide the eraser in and out with a secure locking feature.
Sliding Function:Convenient mechanism for quick access and secure storage.
Vibrant Color Options:Available in green, purple, and pink to match different preferences.

Effective Clean Wiping:Removes pencil marks completely, leaving surfaces spotless.
